title: The Data Security & Privacy Testing Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential and cyclical process for testing the security and privacy controls of a system or application.
elements: Execute Security Tests (e.g., Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Scanning)
Execute Privacy Tests (e.g., Data Access Reviews, Consent Checks)
relationships: Sequential flow from one element to the next, cycling back from 'Re-test & Verify Fixes' to 'Define Test Scope & Objectives' to represent the continuous lifecycle
